uild_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 30\\n    total_steps = max(total_steps, 1)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        T_max=total_steps,\\n        eta_min=LEARNING_RATE * 0.1,\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"The current script leaves scheduling off, and the existing cosine helper is mismatched to the verifier because it decays over a 100-epoch horizon instead of the actual fixed-step budget.
